narration: Welcome to Rachel's Career Constellation — a living map of skills, roles, and connections that define her professional journey.
Rachel's most recent role as Product Manager sits at the heart of the constellation, connecting strategy, execution, and people.
AI & Automation is Rachel's emerging superpower — she has been building intelligent workflows and agentic systems to amplify her team's capacity.
Before product, Rachel led Operations — this role forged her systems thinking and gave her a cross-functional view of the business.
Leadership threads through every node in this constellation — Rachel brings teams together, translates vision to action, and makes complexity navigable.
Zooming out, the full picture emerges: a career web built on curiosity, craft, and connection. This is Rachel's professional story.
